zh.lifeSummary: 當Waltheof II Earl of Northumbria於大約1046年出生在英國諾圖恩布利亞時，他的父親Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria.50歲，母親Ælfflæd III of Northumbria26歲。他和Judith Of Lens至少有2個女兒。他去世於1076年5月31日在英國英格蘭哈普爾聖 基路士 希爾享年31歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾可洛藍德。

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Waltheof II Earl of Northumbria was born about 1046, in Northumbria, England, his father, Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria., was 50 and his mother, Ælfflæd III of Northumbria, was 26. He had at least 2 daughters with Judith Of Lens. He died on 31 May 1076, in Saint Giles Hill, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31, and was buried in Crowland, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Judith Of Lens. Il est décédé le 31 mai 1076, à Saint Giles Hill, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Crowland, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Waltheof II Earl of Northumbria(이)가 대략 1046년 영국 노르스브리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria.(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Ælfflæd III of Northumbria(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Judith Of Lens(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1076년 5월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 세인트 자일스 힐에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 크로우랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Waltheof II Earl of Northumbria nasceu aproximadamente 1046, em Northumbria, Inglaterra, seu pai, Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria., tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Ælfflæd III of Northumbria, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Judith Of Lens. Ele faleceu em 31 de maio de 1076, em Saint Giles Hill, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Crowland, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Waltheof II Earl of Northumbria родился около 1046 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия, его отцу по имени Siward 'Digri' Earl of Northumbria. было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Ælfflæd III of Northumbria, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Judith Of Lens. Он умер 31 мая 1076 г. в местности сеинт джилесь хилл, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности кроуланд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
